level_signals: 7+ years in growth, performance marketing, product, or strategy roles
Senior growth leader for Pet squad
Key member of broader growth and company leadership

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 7+ years in growth, performance marketing, product, or strategy roles, with a focus on owning and scaling a key product or business line
Proven track record driving measurable growth via paid and non-paid channels, with strong business acumen across acquisition, CAC, LTV, and retention
Experience working on a D2C product in a fast-paced, test-and-learn environment, with comfort navigating complex, regulated industries
Demonstrated ability to set a strategic vision and break it into concrete goals, experiments, and roadmaps
High fluency in data, able to interrogate dashboards, run analysis, and partner with analysts to uncover insights and make decisions
Experience leading cross-functional teams or pods, setting priorities, aligning stakeholders, and driving high-velocity output
Excellent communication skills — you can navigate tough conversations, influence stakeholders, and represent your team at all levels of the org
Ability to work in an office environment most days of the week
Enthusiasm about learning and adapting to the exciting world of AI – a commitment to exploring this field is a fundamental part of our culture

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: insurance or fintech experience is a plus

scope.surface: Pet Insurance growth — paid and non-paid channels, lifecycle marketing, partnerships, veterinary distribution
primary_metrics_inferred: Business-level growth objectives for Pet Insurance
core_responsibilities: Execute and evolve the Pet Insurance growth strategy, balancing short- and long-term objectives
Translate strategy into a clear, executable growth plan using paid and non-paid channels, lifecycle marketing, partnerships, and more
Develop and expand new distribution channels, including partner and veterinary relationships
Own the key business metrics and growth objectives for Pet
Lead the go-to-market strategy for new launches, campaigns, and initiatives
Serve as the growth lead for the Pet squad
Influence and shape broader company strategy and planning
Be a thought partner to senior stakeholders

green_flags: Clear ownership scope — Pet Insurance business line with defined metrics (CAC, LTV, retention)
AI-first culture signals a forward-looking environment
Temporary 6-month role (mat-leave cover) — may appeal to candidates seeking shorter engagements or re-entry opportunities
Explicitly states what three things matter for every role (drive, efficiency, adaptability) — cultural transparency
red_flags: Temporary/contract role (6-month mat-leave basis) — no indication of conversion to permanent
No city or location specified — unclear which office candidates would be expected in most days
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not addressed
Office presence 'most days of the week' required but office location not stated
